name: Competition
description: Competition is a Hyperion sniper rifle variant tuned for higher fire rate and a larger magazine in a Vladof-like fashion. It keeps Hyperion handling, becoming more accurate the longer you remain on target, so it favours steady scoped strings over snap shots and rewards consistent follow-up fire once stabilised.
notes: It appears in The Pre-Sequel with similar presentation and a related variant named Fast Turnaround. In Borderlands 2 it can drop as a regular world item from appropriate loot sources.
